REMILIA-STRIKE_REMILIA.title: Strike
REMILIA-DEFEND_REMILIA.title: Defend
REMILIA-SCARLET_FIGURE.title: Scarlet Figure
REMILIA-BLOOD_SUCKING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Consume [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] equal to damage dealt and heal an equal amount of HP.
REMILIA-BLOOD_SUCKING.title: Blood Sucking
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON1.title: Scarlet Fury
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON2.description:
Consume {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards} cards.
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON2.title: Nocturne
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON3.title: The Taste of Blood
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON4.title: River Styx
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON5.title: Nightwing
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON6.title: Lullaby
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON7.title: Blood Bag
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON8.title: Core of Blood
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON9.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Double the enemy's [gold]Claw Marks[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON9.title: Deep Strike
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON10.title: Blood Compensation
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON11.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have drawn at least one card this turn, apply {ClawPrints:diff()} [gold]Claw Mark{ClawPrints:plural:|s}[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON11.title: Bloodthirsty Bite
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON12.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Put 1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON12.selectionScreen: Choose a Card to return to your Hand or draw.
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON12.title: Defying Fate
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON13.title: Scarlet Night Strike
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON14.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, and apply {ClawPrints:diff()} [gold]Claw Mark{ClawPrints:plural:|s}[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON14.title: Sky-Rending Claw
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON15.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reduce cost by {Energy:energyIcons()} if you lost HP this turn.
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON15.title: Bloodthirst
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON16.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw 1 card and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON16.title: Destiny Strike
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON17.title: Majesty
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON18.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON18.title: Storm of Blood
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON19.description:
Draw 1 card.
At the start of the next {RemiliaCommon19Power:diff()} turns, draw 1 card.
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON19.title: Nobile Lineage
REMILIA-REMILIA_COMMON20.title: Heart Strike
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON1.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {ClawPrints:diff()} [gold]Claw Mark{ClawPrints:plural:|s}[/gold].
Consume {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] and return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON1.title: Vampire Claw
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON2.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 1 [gold]Blood Curse[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON2.title: Vampire Fang
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON3.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have drawn a card this turn, gain [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON3.title: Chains of Bloodlust
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON4.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you lose 1 HP, reduce the cost of this card by 1 {Energy:energyIcons()} this combat.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON4.title: Destiny
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON5.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 2 times.
If there is only 1 enemy, attack 1 additional time.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON5.title: Domination
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON6.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Consume all Curses in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for every card consumed.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON6.title: Deceit
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON7.description:
Consume up to {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Deal an equal amount of damage, heal an equal amount of HP, and gain an equal amount of [gold]Block[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON7.title: Spiritual Strike
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON8.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply any debuffs on the enemy to ALL other enemies.
Add 1 [gold]Blood Curse[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON8.title: Scarlet Calamity
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON9.description:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Artifact[/gold] from the enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {BloodPlague:diff()} [gold]Blood Plague[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]Blood Curse[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON9.title: Touch of Death
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON10.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this kills an enemy, gain {BloodPool:diff()} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON10.title: Bone Marrow Strike
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON11.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Consume up to {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] and heal an equal amount of HP.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON11.title: Scarlet Sign 「Nightless Castle Red」
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON12.title: Certain Kill 「Heart Break」
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON13.title: Night Sign 「Demon King Cradle」
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON14.title: Heaven's Punishment 「Star of David」
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON15.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Claw Mark[/gold] on the enemy.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON15.title: Scarlet Sign 「Scarlet Strike」
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON16.description: [gold]Consume[/gold] all [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] and heal an equal amount of HP.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON16.title: Vampire Blood
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON17.description:
Draw 2 cards.
If the enemy intends to attack, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Otherwise, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON17.title: Twisting Fate
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON18.title: Overflowing Blood
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON19.description:
Gain {BloodPool} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Draw 1 card.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card{IfUpgraded:show:| at random}.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON19.title: Blood Conversion
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON20.title: Veil of Night
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON21.title: Boiling Blood
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON22.title: Blood Strengthening
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON23.title: Heartbreaking Serenade
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON24.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON24.title: Blood Urge
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON25.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card then draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
If a Curse is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON25.title: Rebirth
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON26.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Give another player {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and they heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON26.title: Blood Bestowal
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON27.description: Every time you lose HP this turn, gain {RemiliaUncommon27Power:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON27.title: Nether Sign 「Scarlet Netherworld」
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON29.description: At the start of your turn, apply {RemiliaUncommon29Power:diff()} [gold]Blood Plague[/gold] to ALL enemies.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON29.title: Vampiric Plague
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON30.description: Whenever you play an Attack, consume up to {RemiliaUncommon30Power:diff()} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] and heal an equal amount of HP.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON30.title: Vampirism
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON31.description: Increase damage dealt by {RemiliaUncommon31Power:diff()}% and increase damage taken by {RemiliaUncommon31Power:diff()}%.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON31.title: Overwhelming Nobility
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON32.description: If Fatal damage is taken, heal up to 1% of your Max HP once.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON32.title: A Body of Mist
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON33.description: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, gain {RemiliaUncommon33Power} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON33.title: Flower in the Mist
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON34.title: Moon in the Water
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON35.description: At the start of your turn, apply {RemiliaUncommon35Power:diff()} [gold]Claw Mark{RemiliaUncommon35Power:plural:|s}[/gold] to ALL enemies.
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON35.title: Count Scarlet
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON36.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {RemiliaUncommon36Power:diff()} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON36.title: Blood Reversal
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON37.description: Deal {Damage} damage {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times. Apply {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} [gold]Blood Plague[/gold]. Apply {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} [gold]Claw Mark{ClawPrints:plural:|s}[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_UNCOMMON37.title: Heir of Bloodthirst
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE1.description:
Consume all [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] to deal an equal amount of damage to ALL enemies and heal an equal amount of HP.{IfUpgraded:show:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].|}
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE1.title: Scarlet Devil 「Scarlet Devil」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE2.description:
Consume {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {ClawPrints:diff()} [gold]Claw Mark{ClawPrints:plural:|s}[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE2.title: Night Sign 「Bad Lady Scramble」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE3.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Claw Mark[/gold] on the enemy.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], add a copy of this card with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] and [gold]Ethereal[/gold] that costs 0.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE3.title: God's Punishment 「Young Demon Lord」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE4.description:
Consume {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE4.title: Night Lord 「Dracula Cradle」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE5.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage, Add 1 [gold]Blood Curse[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each Curse you have.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE5.title: Devil 「Remilia Stretch」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE6.title: Bat 「Vampire Sweep」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE7.description:
Consume {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} to ALL enemies and return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE7.title: Night Sign 「Bombard Night」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE8.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to another player and gain [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
Both players gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain an additional {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Energy:energyIcons()}.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE8.title: Hell Sign 「Mountain of a Thousand Needles」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE9.description:
Consume {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Shuffle ALL of another player's [gold]Hand[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], then they draw {Cards} card.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE9.title: Manipulating Fate
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE10.title: Illusory Fate
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE11.title: Destiny 「Miserable Fate」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE12.description:
Consume {BloodCost} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
Return all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Choose {Cards} card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE12.title: God Devil 「Remilia Stalker」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE13.description:
Draw cards until your [gold]Hand[/gold] is full.{IfUpgraded:show:
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.|}
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE13.title: God Art 「Vampire Illusion」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE14.title: 「Scarlet Gensokyo」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE15.description: This turn, your Attacks are played an extra time.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE15.title: 「Queen of Midnight」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE16.title: Scarlet Devil Form
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE17.description:
At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE17.title: Scarlet Night Fantasia
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE18.description: Whenever any creature dies, gain {RemiliaRare18Power:diff()} [gold]Blood Pool[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE18.title: Death and Decay
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE20.description: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply {RemiliaRare20Power:diff()} [gold]Claw Mark{RemiliaRare20Power:plural:|s}[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE20.title: 「Millennium Vampire」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE21.description: Against enemies with HP lower than your Max HP, the damage dealt is increased by {RemiliaRare21Power:diff()}%.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE21.title: Scarlet Sign 「Scarlet Meister」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE22.description:
Whenever you draw a Curse, lose 1 HP and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
Whenever a Curse is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], draw 1 card and gain {RemiliaRare22Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE22.title: Curse 「Curse of Vlad Tepes」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE24.description: At the start of your turn, draw {RemiliaRare24Power:diff()} card{RemiliaRare24Power:plural:|s}.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE24.title: 「Red Magic」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE25.description: Apply {BloodPlague} [gold]Blood Plague[/gold] to ALL enemies. repeat {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE25.title: Sigil 「Nightmare of the World」
REMILIA-REMILIA_RARE26.title: Scarlet Sign 「Bloody Magic Square」
REMILIA-REMILIA_ANCIENT1.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal additional damage equal to 25% of your Max HP.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], raise your Max HP by {MaxHp:diff()} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
REMILIA-REMILIA_ANCIENT1.title: Divine Spear 「Spear of Gungnir」
REMILIA-REMILIA_ANCIENT2.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Consume [gold]Blood Pool[/gold] equal to damage dealt and heal an equal amount of HP.
REMILIA-REMILIA_ANCIENT2.title: Raging Blood
REMILIA-BLOOD_CURSE.description:
At the end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], lose {HpLoss} HP.
When played, lose {HpLoss2} HP and draw {Cards} cards.
REMILIA-BLOOD_CURSE.title: Blood Curse
